banner: DRAFT — NOT SUBMITTED — review with a human before proceeding
scenario: Illustrative mock filer: Björg Ólafsdóttir, a private operator (sole trader) in Reykjavík starting 'Björg Design', a graphic-design and visual-branding consultancy. Björg registers for both new VAT registration and new employer registration (she plans to hire one part-time employee starting September 2026), is not taking over an existing business, registers income via pre-numbered and electronic invoices, and estimates her own calculated remuneration under the 'Expert services' reference group. All names, numbers, and identifiers are fabricated test data, not a real filer's information.

collectedValues.label: VAT registration: new registration from and incl. (dd.mm.yy)
Registration for employers: new registration from and incl. (dd.mm.yy)

collectedValues.value: Graphic design and visual branding services

Registers income via: pre-numbered giro slip

Are machinery or other operational assets taken over?
Class of activity
collectedValues.value: Graphic design and visual branding consultancy

collectedValues.label: Employer resident abroad or embassy in Iceland
Salary payments for construction of real estate for own use

No wage payments to others. Only calculated remuneration (wages) at own business.

collectedValues.value: Reference category and remuneration levels follow RSK's published minimum reference tables for expert design services; no deviation from reference groups.

collectedValues.label: Comments
collectedValues.value: First-time registration; part-time employee hire planned for September 2026.

conformanceCheck.method: Programmatic re-derivation of every field's effective visibility/requiredness from the schema's own requiredWhen members (a GSP-0013 condition evaluator), cross-checked against collectedValues + notApplicableFields for exact 1:1 coverage of all fields in schema.fields.
